title: 3GPP TS 23.501 - System Architecture
content: Defines 5G system architecture including all Network Functions (AMF, SMF, UPF, UDM, AUSF, NRF, PCF, NEF, NSSF), reference points (N1-N22), service-based interfaces, and network slicing architecture.

title: 3GPP TS 23.502 - Procedures
content: Defines 5G procedures: Registration, PDU Session Establishment, Service Request, Handover, Network Slice selection, Authentication (5G-AKA, EAP-AKA), and Policy Control procedures.

title: 3GPP TS 23.503 - Policy and Charging
content: Defines Policy and Charging Control (PCC) in 5G. QoS flows, charging rules, SMF-PCF interaction via N7.

title: 3GPP TS 23.731 - O-RAN Architecture
content: Open RAN architecture: O-CU, O-DU, O-RU split, fronthaul interface (eCPRI), RIC (Near-RT and Non-RT), A1/E2/O1 interfaces.

title: 3GPP TS 29.244 - PFCP (N4)
content: Packet Forwarding Control Protocol used on N4 interface between SMF and UPF. Session establishment, FAR, PDR, QER rules.

title: CAMARA Quality-on-Demand
content: API to request QoS profiles for device sessions. Parameters: device, qosProfile (LATENCY/THROUGHPUT), duration. Uses NEF to map to PCF policies.

title: CAMARA SIM Swap
content: API to check if SIM was swapped. Returns: latestSimChange timestamp. Used for fraud prevention in financial transactions.

title: CAMARA Device Status
content: API to check device reachability, roaming status. Returns: reachable (bool), roaming (bool), batteryLevel.

title: CAMARA Number Verification
content: API to verify phone number matches device. Used for passwordless auth, transaction verification.
